headline: 2 Reasons PYPL is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: PayPal has gotten torched over the last six months - since November 2025, its stock price has dropped 33% to $45.03 per share. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Adobe (ADBE) Integrates Agentic AI With Major Tech Platforms to Automate Customer Workflows
summary: Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) is one of the cheap stocks to buy for the next 10 years. On April 20, Adobe expanded its partner ecosystem at Adobe Summit 2026, integrating its new agentic AI system, Adobe CX Enterprise, with major tech platforms including AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft, and NVIDIA. This expansion enables businesses to deploy AI-driven, […]
